column1: Debby is now a hurricane. Winds are 75 mph. No changes to track or landfall estimate. We are LIVE right now on DPL so if you have any questions, you can stop by and say Hi. Jason Adams will be in shortly as well. ABC Action News at 11 starts now.

Denis, I've been here over 50 years. I have to tell you the rain, wind was some of the worst I've seen. Sorry, but I have freaked out a bit. This is a bad storm. I will have many neighbors and friends that will have to deal with issues after the storm passes. Be safe everyone
I 1000 percent agree with you! Lived here 52 years, never been this bad no matter what storm.

we moved here almost 4 yrs ago from NJ and to me this is worse than Ian was! I told hubby if this what Florida is going to be like I don’t think I want to live here anymore! My anxiety is going through the roof! 😫😫
where are you? It’s not too bad by us.
crazy how certain areas get hard hit than others. I’m near Clearwater and it was windy but not that bad.
this is nothing compared to what we've experienced. Irma and other tropical storms in 2017, some no name storms too were far worse. The no name one we had in December was horrific
you are blessed because this is nothing compared to what we went through with hurricane Ian in Fort Myers.
I was thinking the exact same. Take care! 💕
Yes, Ive been here many years also - the winds had some bad gusts!
Totally agree 👍🏻
what general area are you in? We were here for Ian, we are having significantly less wind.

I’m in River Ridge (north NPR) and it has been so incredibly lackluster all day. Big nothing burger. The thunderstorm yesterday was way worse. It’s only thundered twice (minor ones) and just soft rain with occasional downpours. This is like a light spring storm in Nebraska. I guess we are blessed because it sounds like it’s way worse to the west of me.
Denis Phillips thank you for your coverage, long hours and hard work! Top notch and sooo appreciated!!

Edit: 45 minutes later we are at 11.6”…
9.5” of rain today in Port Richey. Over an inch just in the last 30 minutes.
wow! It hasn’t let up in hours.
Ugh, high winds and flooding in St Pete Beach

we are supposed to be flying into
Tampa on Tuesday morning.
Just received an Emergency flash flood Alert, lived pretty close to St Pete Beach.
yes, we're in Don Cesar place and we've been flooded all afternoon and it's getting higher next to hotel Zamora

we lived across from Don Cesar, and we're on Casablanca Ave, unfortunately our streets all flood.
Hopefully by tomorrow the tide will go back down. High tide is supposed to be 3am. 🤞🙏 it's not too bad.
The Don Cesar is a Beautiful hotel, I'm sure it will be better in the morning

we will know more tomorrow. This storm is not hitting our area hard, but trees may be down, roads & bridges may be closed, there will be local flooding tomorrow. Keep your eye on this page, people will report what is going on. You should call the hotel in the morning also to get an update, flooding may affect access to the beach and the parking. Should get better as the storm moves by.
Thankyou so much, we will call the hotel in the morning, hope you are all safe and well xx
Thankyou so much for the updated will keep an eye on this page, hope you are all ok and safe xx
I truly hope you have a nice time at the Don Cesar. Definitely call the hotel this morning. Our street on Casablanca Ave is still flooded. Hopefully will go down soon!! 🙏🙏
parking lot and roads near the hotel are open. Lots of flooded side streets.
Stay safe. My son lives on 49th N. Do you happen to know how things are there?
They moved the track and Tallahassee isn't even in it anymore
Taylor county looks to be it. I doubt we will get much in Tallahassee now.
I'm praying so much for the people in steinhatchee and everyone being affected by this hurricane. Please stay safe.
I wish this was over already!! The wind is howling and the rain is crazy! My Husband, has drained our pool 3 times already!! Be safe everyone!
Oh boy can I tell a difference here in Tarpon right now.
is that near New Port Richey?
yes
it’s just bigger gust of winds than earlier. It’s definitely not hurricane winds. I just noticed a change.
The wind 🌬️ and rain 🌧️ in Clearwater is insane. Praying 🙏🏻 this passes through soon.
same in Largo! Areas that never flood are flooding! 😢
do you know if there is flooding in downtown Clearwater?
I haven’t heard but I know they were watching the tides. I’m at Sunset and Belcher and heard that parts of Belcher are flooded.
Thank you so much. I will keeping following. Glad you are not flooded.
I've never seen a tropical storm this bad before!
me either! I’ve lived here 24 years. It’s crazy. 🙏🏻
Our mobile home park is completely flooded. The streets are like a river!
it's upgraded to a hurricane
Anyone in St. AUGUSTINE Jacksonville. How is it there?
Wind is nuts right now by the beach in saint pete. Rain is about to start up again. Love those outer bands they're a doozy.
- the wind is insane -

Clearwater is being pounded by rain and the wind is horrible! Been without power now for almost two hours now and I know they can’t/won’t put workers in harms way to get it fixed. It’s going to be a long and warm night. Be safe everyone and stay off the roads! Prayers to our first responders.

I’m hoping to get a few hours of sleep before work but it’ll end up being about 4 hours max. The flooding is giving me anxiety since I don’t have flood insurance (never seen it like this before!) so I’m having trouble sleeping

it’s 3:30 am and one dog woke me up desperate to go out since she refused all day yesterday. She was leery with all the wind, but rain has stopped and she tiptoed 😂 around until she could go. We haven’t had power in 6 hours, so the house is now hot and humid making it difficult to sleep. Work will be rough, but hopefully they will show us grace since they are in the same boat. Take it easy and stay alert on the roads. 🙂
school closed for me, thank goodness. I am so sorry you still have to go in:(

From Dunedin, it certainly was tense there for awhile, we were keeping an eye on our pond out back of our home-since it is fed by the gulf, but we made it through-- fingers crossed and alot of prayers too.We;ll take a walk around the property when things dry out a little, for now just staying put. Thank you being there with us through this, would not have made it without your calming words.
I need to pick up my sister and mom from the st Pete airport. Is it flooded? Or am I good to go? It's only raining a little here in dunedin now!
This is a scary TS. It's sounds like a hurricane outside here in Clearwater 🫣🌀
what is TS. I have seen a few people use that.
TS is the abbreviation for tropical storm
Zephyrhills is windy and rainy on and off, often, times real heavy!!
same in Wesley Chapel
Heaviest wind in north fort myers right now!
The track has shifted east, what is the probability of it continuing to shift further east tonight?
Denis, currently vacationing in Charleston and trying to drive back to Tampa tomorrow morning. Will we be able to skim by the storm early Monday morning?
You might need to try….. Listen to Patrick Pat Prokop's Weather and Nature Page
not a good idea....wait for it to completely pass over .
Still having very strong gusts of wind and driving rain in Seminole.☔️🦆💧
Thank you!
we have no power here in Seminole. We are right next to the Seminole lake park.
hope it's back on now!-??

Hillsborough county teachers are reporting to various training locations across the county at 7:30AM tomorrow (Monday) morning. Where can we view current road flooding conditions to help us get there safely? Thanks!
it is wild to me that some counties are flooded and you have to go in. Hernando has closed all work sites tomorrow!
This is what my phone looks like right now as of 2AM and the trainings are still on schedule for this morning in Tampa.
Citrus County Schools are closed - keep checking your District for updates - especially now that storm has upgraded to hurricane .
They should cancel. It's supposed to continue raining tomorrow too.
good question. Same with Pinellas County Schools.
I honestly can't believe Pinellas hasn't called off work for tomorrow with all of the flooding. It's only going to be worse in the morning.
I know.. as a pinellas county teacher with no electricity right now.. I’m in shock.
they have cancelled school for less than this. I am dumbfounded.
well it’s just us teachers going into work tomorrow…. It’s making me think they don’t care about us..🥲
Also a Pinellas County teacher: Prepping my boat to get to work tomorrow
Our apt complex is flooded in st Pete I would stay off the streets over here
It could be worse if it had been slower in the gulf.
The wind is insane in Largo right now!!
It's never ending!!
Heavy rains and wind on waterfront now in Hudson. Lightning and thunder as well. High tide 2 am

I could hear it getting stronger out there .
Thank you and to your team for keeping us updated.
Super windy feels great outside right now
Sounded like a train passing full speed. Rain and wind just now calmed in Temple terrace .
train sound is the tornadoes
It’s real windy here in Hudson
it is!!
and it’s coming down in buckets
Pretty intense in Inverness right now. Thank you for the updates.
Does anyone know how wide the entire hurricane is? It looks pretty wide with the outer bands
not sure how accurate 😂
Is it just me or it didn’t the last two radar images show it’s moving east or is it an eye wall replacement cycle?
I was thinking the same. The updated track is from that little jog.
Is it totally away from the Tampa Bay Area? Other than the rain?
it's right over Tampa Bay right now.
In Floral City here. Just a lot of rain and wind on and off all day. So far so good! 🙏🙏🙏
Oh dear, hopefully everyone will be safe ♥️
thanks
Should Ocala get just heavy rain?
that's what I thought till I saw how bad Clearwater is getting hammered. Might be more wind and rain coming than I thought
Do you know when will it hit Tallahassee?
Big thunder in north west Palm Harbor!!!
yes! Loud!
What's Valdosta going to get?
The wind in Largo/Belleair Bluffs is strong right now!
it’s so bad in largo 😬
I live in Largo and the wind is insane. Can't wait for this to pass.
it’s keeping me up. 😭 the house next door has a large tree next to my room. I hope they cut it down one day.
I'm watching The Weather Channel and see how they are helping people out to safety in canoes. 💔 God bless and keep you safe and neighbors!
we have 8 old oaks and a giant old pine in the yard, and I am really, really done with the wind!!

this cracked me up,, sorry. Your Lil doggies face. I know serious but thanks for the giggle. Really really needed that. Im near Pinellas Park at 1130 at night and still getting strong gusts and rain bands coming off Gulf. Prayers to everyone
pretty crazy in Tarpon Springs too!
Largo for the last few hours:
Ton of rain in Brandon for hours.
here too. All night ...🌧🌀🌊🌊
We are flying to clearwater beach on Monday morning. We will land at 11 lsh. Do you think it will be safe or think it will get canceled?
We're on the dirty side of the rotation so the winds and rain were fairly brutal. Subsiding now tho..but it was a lot worse than I expected that's for sure.
Thank you for staying up with everyone tracking this storm!
I waited patiently for you to type, Denis Phillips!
me too. I’m a faster typist so my patience was running thin more than it has thru this entire storm 🤣😅 and I’ve been without power since 8
oh no! So far, we have power and I hope it stays that way. Where are you located? I’m by Weeki Wachee - daughter is in New Port Richey.
Pinellas park area

me too. Been a monstrous day 4 hours straight and more coming in off Gulf. Lost electricity 2x but came back on. This is nuts. I'm born and raised in Florida . Waiting for that last tailwhip. 🙏 just saw lightning
I think Duke just gave us a teaser! Ceiling fan turned 2 rotations and stopped. Teasers! 🤣😂
me too. Thanks Denis Phillips!!!
we sure type fast!
same!! 😂😂
we type fast!
Denis Phillips is fabulous at keeping every updated regarding hurricane info. I stalked his webpage during Hurricane Ian.
Omg now it’s a hurricane it’s felt like a hurricane all day 😳
agree.
Just incredible I can hear airplanes going over our house in this mess. I would not want to be on that flight.
yup! Just heard a plane take off from SRQ. These pilots are amazing.
same!!!

I’ve live here my entire life (33 years) and I’ve never experience this even with a more dead on hit in Port Richey. Soooooo much rain. We never get flooded but today we saw it. Crazy how this thing came on so quickly and strong!!
Insane rain, thunder and wind in NPR. Had to unplug my NOAA radio because it was going off every 2 minutes!
Thank you for all your hard work ..you are a voice of comfort
What does that mean for Tampa
it means it’ll be starting to calm down here in a few hours. We’re good.
Pounding Us here in Holiday right now
I’m gonna be that guy and ask if outgoing TPA flights on Monday could be cancelled
How’s Hudson on Bolton ave
I live in beacon woods and the wind and rain is crazy!!
How's Tampa Florida going so far
Wet & windy 😉
Be safe everyone!❤️
Denis Phillips are you simulcasting on a radio station tonight?
Wind and rain in Steinhatchee. Power was out for about an hour. It’s going to be a long night here.
Prayers for everyone's safety 🙏🏻
Lightning thunder and rain in Zephyrhills
Strong winds & heavy rain in Pasco

Denis Phillips visiting family in Atlanta area right now. When will it get here?
(Cause it always follows me from our home in Florida) lol
Suggestion, move the storm name and data over so part of the track is not covered.
High winds & heavy rain in Lutz right now.
How do I see DPL live? Thank you
ABC Action News
he’s live now on Facebookz
Lotta lightning on Madeira beach, didn’t think that was normal for hurricanes?

i just said this earlier. no lightening then later boom. We got tropical and turned into hurricane after passing us. different kind of storm after the bands im guessing.... Denis Phillips please help us understand this.? We love understanding as much as you know 🥰
any storm surge across Gulf Blvd in Madeira?
yes it just came up over sea wall along Boca Ciega Ave. gulf blvd looks to be flooded by caddy’s
any idea what kind of height/depth to the surge? My parents are literally across the street from Caddys.
Omg how can I find DPL live
ABC Action News.
Insane amount of rain in Oldsmar.
our tree fell on my sons car around 8 pm We are in oldsmar Streets are flooded
wow! So sorry 😞
this storm has been pretty bad
my husband suspects we are up to about 7-8" of rain from this
Wind and rain insane in Lakewood ranch right now !!!!
Wind is crazy in downtown npr
yea I thought it was slowing down after 1000pm & it seems Stronger to me
any flooding ? My boutique is in downtown and I’m worried
I didn’t see any flooding when I just left downtown
thank u
Lakeland has been getting very strong winds with even stronger gust all evening. Howling! And we are on the very outer edge!
Anyone in Spring Hill? What’s going on there?
I was going to ask the same. My daughter & grandson live there & I am concerned.
some areas lost power. Lots of rain and mild winds.
rain and wind, and some power outages reported
pretty windy lots of rain. The gusts just started getting louder outside
we are in Hudson near Spring Hill lots of wind and rain . Still have power .
thank you so much!
heavy rain and wind, with reported power outages
lots of heavy winds and rain.
thanks so much!
Heavy rain and wind gusts in Spring Hill. Banana trees are down and granddaughters wooden sandbox somehow flipped upside down. I have woods across the street and I've been hearing trees breaking.
I’m in Mariner and this is nuts!!! Stay safe
You too! I think my greenhouse is gone. lol
oh no!!!!!
Land O Lakes reporting rain and intermediate winds
How can I hear your report. We have a power outage but my phone is charged
ABC Action News app.
Thank you for keeping us informed.
Picking up in Homosassa
5 inches of rain in Zephryhills yesterday.
I worry about my friend in Gainesville…. What are you thinking for them?
What is DPL? What platform is it on?
